Name: JUMP_SPECIFY_ALT_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the configurations for vertical ascent points in missions.

Fields.Name: Goal Altitude
Fields.Description: The target altitude the vertical ascent platform will aim for when you jump. In metres.

Fields.Name: Gravity %
Fields.Description: The gravity percentage to apply during the vertical ascent jump.

Fields.Name: Previous Horizontal Speed %
Fields.Description: The percentage of horizontal speed to retain upon triggering the vertical ascent.

Fields.Name: Maximum Horizontal Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum horizontal speed that is retained upon triggering the vertical ascent. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Acceleration
Fields.Description: The horizontal acceleration to apply to the user upon triggering the vertical ascent. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Jump Angle based on Input
Fields.Description: The jump angle that is used upon triggering the vertical ascent, based on the current input upon triggering it.

Fields.Name: Maximum Jump Angle based on Input
Fields.Description: The maximum jump angle that is used upon triggering the vertical ascent, based on the current input upon triggering it.
